feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Hub
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Hub Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to delete the leading zero in SAC Dimension from SAP Business Bydesign Datasource?
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Hello Everyone,

I'm working on integrating sales orders from an SAP Business ByDesign data source. When refreshing the dimension, data is coming in with leading zeros, even though I set the dimension to an integer in the modeler. Unfortunately, this isn’t trimming the leading zeros as expected. I also tried a script in stories to remove them, but I’m encountering errors. Does anyone know of another way to display the values without leading zeros?

If anyone has faced a similar issue, your advice would be appreciated!

 

Regards

Janarthanan

+919884594169

meetjana@hotmail.com

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Is there any way to sync an all-Page filter with an Input_Control filter?
entry.content:
I have a bar chart in Page 1. I want to select a dimension in the bar chart from Page 1 to filter whole of Page 2 using that value.

I'm able to do this, but the problem is that I already have an Input Control page filter on Page 2; the value of which is not changing because of the Page 1 filter. Is there any way to sync the All-Page / Story filter with an Input Control filter?

entry.title: How to show the Story Filter value in a Textbox in SAC?
entry.content:
I want to show the story filter value in a textbox. If 'All' is selected in the filter, then it should show 'All Business Units' otherwise it should show only the specific value that is selected. 

Currently what I did: I used a dynamic text & added that in the textbox. It shows 'All Business Units' when 'All' is selected in the filter, but if other options are selected (for example X or Y), then it is showing 'X Business Units' or 'Y Business Units' because the Business Units section is hardcoded in the textbox. I only want to show X or Y when the specific option is selected in the filter.

Is this possible to achieve? Kindly suggest if there's any way to achieve this!

entry.title: How to change a numeric value to a percentage value in a numeric point chart in SAC?
entry.content:
I have a numeric point chart which shows some value & this value is coming from a filter / input_control in SAC.

I want to use a button to switch between a numeric value & a percentage value in the chart. Is this possible to achieve? Kindly share solutions, if possible!

entry.title: SAC USER ID
entry.content:
Hi All,

What is the best option for USER ID in SAC?

I am planning to use the employee ID as the USER ID, but users who were created directly in IAS do not have an employee ID. Which attributes from Azure and IAS would be best to use as the USER ID in SAC?

Is the login name field in IAS always provisioned as the USER ID in SAC via IPS?

Thank you so much.

Best Regards

entry.title: Upload/copy paste to table level not to model in SAP SAC Story
entry.content:
Hi Experts!!

Here is the requirement!!

we want to copy paste from excel to SAC table /Story. While copy pasting it is taking time and performance is poor. is there any custom widget or solution to upload a file just to story table respecting filters not to model level.

Note:

1.Kindly don't recommend Upload starter , as our model has many dimensions to map, where user file doesn' t have , it has to pick up story/table level filters.

2. We have already pre-populated the data to initialize the combinations with zero's , as our data is a NON-SAP data at discrete level. (validation rules will not work as we have more than 8 dimensions)

using CSV or Excel file just upload data to story at table level only (Not via Upload/Import Jobs from model)

Model level /upload starter we tried , but we have to write custom logic to fetch other dimensions 

 

Thanks

Surya Harsha

 

@William_Yu1  

@N1kh1l

entry.title: SAC Table values calculating in sac tables using Formulas
entry.content:
Hi All,

Is it possible to calculate values using data from table 1 row 20  and table 3 Row 13 and put them in  table 2: Row 1  highlighted as A   

 

Can you help with formulas to achieve and possible solutions

entry.title: SAC manual import and conenction with Live data
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I am reaching out to seek your advice on the best practices for importing manual data into SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) on a monthly basis and subsequently joining this data with live SAP data connections. Specifically, I have a few questions that I would appreciate your insights on:

  1. Optimal Storage Path for Manual Data:

    • Could you recommend the most suitable storage path for the manual data? For instance, would using Google Drive or another cloud storage service be ideal for this purpose? I am looking for a solution that ensures easy access and integration with SAC.

  2. Best Medium for Automatic Data Integration:

    • What would be the best medium to automatically join the manual data with the live SAP data every month? The structure of the manual data will remain consistent, with only the values changing each month. I am interested in a method that minimizes manual intervention and ensures seamless integration.

  3. Monthly Data Refresh:

    • Both the manual data and the live SAP data will need to be refreshed once a month. Could you provide guidance on the most efficient way to set up this monthly refresh for both data sources within SAC?


#SAC #SACSTORY #SAP #SAPANALYTICAL

entry.title: How to Compare versions by selecting manually
entry.content: "I have four public versions: two are Forecast and two are Budget. I want to use two separate input controls, one to display only the Forecast versions, and another to display only the Budget versions. The user should be able to manually select one Forecast version and one Budget version from the respective input controls to compare between one forecast and one budget in a table."

entry.title: Some duplicated values on SAC export
entry.content:
Hello, I'm kinda stumped by something and need any help I could get. 

I've built a dashoard on SAC which is a big inventory table. When I export the table to Excel, some rows (around 2 or 3% of the total) display duplicated values on Excel. However, on the SAC interface and on DSP, they're showing the correct values. 

Any idea what is happening? 

EDIT: Thank you for responses, I figured out what was the origin of the issue: I had two calculated dimension using the same field, when I took these off, my export was correct. We suspect it might be related to language translation on those fileds, we will be opening a case with SAP.

entry.title: After job run in BODS material code is not generated
entry.content:
For data integration from api to s4hana BODS is implemented. After batch job is successful data can see in s4hana but one field is showing like " Sent to SAP " but material is not generating code.

I am pasting snap here.

Can anyone help in this why date, time & material code not generated even though it is integrated from api to s4hana.

entry.title: In SAC - Calculate Absent date
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I have an requirement to calculate the Absent date with the below data,

I have punch in date that we can consider as 'PRESENT ',need to get the absent date. Which is not in my source.

source system - success factor using import model.

can anyone suggest any workaround to achieve this will helps us lot.

Thanks in advance,

entry.title: Tracking Import Job Status and Sending Daily Email Notifications in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
In SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC), I am scheduling multiple import jobs for a particular data source where the data is imported from an SAP ERP system.

Is there a way to track the status of these scheduled import jobs (e.g., success, failure, duration, etc.) and automatically send a daily email notification summarizing the job refresh status?

If yes, could someone please suggest the detailed steps or best approach to achieve this?

entry.title: SAC Scripting : Measure Value
entry.content:
How can I fetch a measure value using SAC scripting and show that value in a Text widget?
I need a script example to read a measure’s value (sum) and apply it dynamically to a Text widget.

entry.title: Need free access to SAP Server online for practice
entry.content: I am currently learning SAP MM but I need free access as a client user to all necessary module. Where can I get free access to cloud system for practice or download on a virtual machine. Please, help .

entry.title: Badge not received after course completion
entry.content:
Hi Team,

i have completed the course but have not received any Badge after course completion 

Below are the courses for reference: 

Exploring SAP Analytics Cloud

Performing Manual Planning with SAP Analytics Cloud

Designing Stories in SAP Analytics Cloud

please suggest and help to resolve this

entry.title: Based on the quarter selection in the input control dates should reflect in the table
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Is it possible to get the last months of every quarter based on the selection of the date at  quarter level.

suppose if i select 2026Q1 in the input Control then in the view of the table is required as below

 

Input control ---- 2026Q1         
VERSIONFORECAST        
 DATE202503202506202509202512202603202606202609202612
ACCOUNT         
KPI1         

similarly if date is selected as 2026Q2 then the required view is as below

Input control ---- 2026Q2         
VERSIONFORECAST        
 DATE202506202509202512202603202606202609202612202703
ACCOUNT         
KPI1         

so if the user select a quarter then we need post and pre 4 last month of each quarter  in the table how can we achieve  this.

entry.title: Queries and CDS in SAP SAC
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have two questions regarding the standard queries that we want to use in SAC live models:

  1. Is it possible to add a non-compounded key display for the G/L Account to the standard query "2CCFIFINSTMTCMP - Balance Sheet/Income Statement - Multidimensional" (like in Trial Balance)? Currently, only the compounded key is available in the attributes once loaded into SAC.

SAC:

Fiori:

Trial balance in Fiori:

2. We would like to create a Trial Balance report in SAC using "C_PL_StRpGLAcctTrialBalItmQry - GL Account Trial Balance Query – Poland," but we cannot find dedicated query in the SAC query base. Is it available in SAC?

entry.title: SCIM3 PATCH API returning 403 Forbidden in SAP Analytics Cloud (GET works, Admin access available)
entry.content:
Hi folks,

I am facing an issue while using the SCIM3 API in SAP Analytics Cloud to update team members using PATCH operation.

API Details

Endpoint:

PATCH  /api/v1/scim3/Groups/<TEAM_UUID>

Authentication:
  • Authorization Bearer Token
Headers Used

  • Authorization: Bearer <access_token>

  • x-csrf-token: <csrf_token>

  • x-sap-sac-custom-auth: true

Payload
"schemas": [
            "urn:ietf:params:scim:api:messages:2.0:PatchOp"
        ],
        "Operations": [
            {
                "op":"add",
                "path":"members",
                "value":[
                    {
                        "value":"d0bbac78-776890-9876hjmd",
                        "type":"User",
                        "display":"newuser",
                        "$ref":"/api/v1/scim3/Users/d0bbac78-776890-9876hjmd"
                    }
                ]
            },
            {
                "op": "replace",
            "path": "urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:sap:2.0:Group:description",
            "value": "patch test"
            }
        ]
Issue

The PATCH request consistently returns:

{
"status": 403,
"error":"Forbidden"
}

Observations

  • GET operations on /api/v1/scim3/Groups are working successfully.
  • Team UUID is retrieved correctly.
  • Team type is userGroup.
  • I have full admin access (BI_Admin role) in SAP Analytics Cloud.
  • OAuth Client is configured with API access with App Integration.
  • CSRF Token is fetched and passed correctly.
  • when CSRF token is removed, the API returns 401 Unauthorized.
  • PATCH always returns 403 Forbidden.
Questions
  1. Are there additional permissions required specifically for SCIM3 PATCH operations ?
  2. Does the OAuth client require explicit SCIM provisioning(write) permissions?
  3. Are there any tenant-level restrictions for SCIM3 write operations ?
Attachments
  • PATCH request (headers + payload)

 

  • Response (403 Forbidden)

Any guidance would be helpful

Thanks!

entry.title: SAC Data Action for Allocation
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Could you please assist in developing the Data Action logic for the following requirement?

Dimension: ALLOC_CYCLE
This dimension contains the required properties.

ID

Stage

Active

Driver

Parenth

AC_CYCLE1

1

Y

D_DRIVER1

ALL_AC

AC_CYCLE2

2

N

D_DRIVER2

ALL_AC

AC_CYCLE3

6

Y

D_DRIVER3

ALL_AC

AC_CYCLE4

8

Y

D_DRIVER1

ALL_AC

AC_CYCLE5

5

Y

D_DRIVER2

ALL_AC

Data Action Parameters:

  • Allocation_Cycle
  • Target Version (Default)

The user can either select a single allocation cycle or choose a hierarchy to process multiple cycles.

Validation Rules for Allocation

  1. For the selected allocation cycle(s), the system should validate whether the Cycle Active flag = "Y". If the cycle is not active, it should be excluded from processing.
  2. Allocation cycles should be processed based on their Stage, in ascending order (i.e., from Stage "1" through Stage "N").

Logic for Allocation

  1. Reading of Drivers Data  - Driver data is stored under:
    • Allocation Cycle = "NO_CYCLE"
    • Account = CYCLE.DRIVERS (property of Allocation Cycle dimension)

    •  

       

      Date

      P01 (2026)

      P02 (2026)

      P03 (2026)

      P04 (2026)

      P05 (2026)

      P06 (2026)

      P07 (2026)

      P08 (2026)

      P09 (2026)

      P10 (2026)

      P11 (2026)

      P12 (2026)

      Account

      Allocation Cycle

      Costobject

       

       

       

       

       

       

       

       

       

       

       

       

      D_DRIVER1

      NO_CYCLE

      YZETLYJGKC

      0.007788

      0.855474

      0.084999

      0.081403

      0.529231

      0.013347

      0.562226

      0.05978

      0.039798

      0.179218

      0.696424

      0.914806

      D_DRIVER1

      NO_CYCLE

      XPUCXNVFHA

      0.959009

      TMRJJUDRYC

      0.218391

      0.479361

      XPUCXNVFHA

      0.526565

      0.262203

      0.714602

    • Example:
      If the user selects Allocation Cycle = AC_CYCLE4, its corresponding driver data is stored under Account = DRIVER2.

      Requirement:
      Retrieve driver data for each selected allocation cycle and aggregate/summarize it by:

      • Allocation Cycle
      • Account
      • Time (excluding Cost Object)

     

  2. Reading of Non Allocated Data -  Below filter to read non allocated data >

                Filter - Allocation Cycle ≠ Current Processing Cycle

 

 

Date

P01 (2026)

P02 (2026)

P03 (2026)

P04 (2026)

P05 (2026)

P06 (2026)

P07 (2026)

P08 (2026)

P09 (2026)

P10 (2026)

P11 (2026)

P12 (2026)

Account

Allocation Cycle

Costobject

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

100001

AC_CYCLE1

YZETLYJGKC

389856

868585

508690

404820

62869

880594

681904

195872

914810

128550

116960

100002

AC_CYCLE3

XPUCXNVFHA

664615

672946

Example:
If AC_CYCLE4 is being processed, its data should be excluded from the source dataset.

In this case system should not pick “AC_CYCLE4” data as we passed this as a parameter selection

3. Allocation Processing

  • Loop through Non-Allocated Data
  • Loop through Driver Data
  • Use the aggregated driver values to perform allocation calculations
  • Each record from Non-Allocated Data should be processed against all relevant driver records for the respective allocation cycle.
  1. Posting Results
  • Write back the calculated allocation data to the target version.

@N1kh1l  - Could you please help on this.

 

Best regards,

Aastha
